_note: Tightened from 36400 → 371 after the universal title-cap fixes landed (commits bee5cd575 blog, 6a72e4cd5 expired-job, 5ea95d9b2 SPA shell, 8bc457e8c collision-map). CI run 25013601912 (HEAD afae99f2) reported 371 offenders > 90 char on 118182 indexable pages — a 98.98% reduction from the pre-fix snapshot. The new floor lets the ratchet detect the very first regression: any future template change that re-inflates titles past the 90-char SERP-display soft budget fails the deploy gate immediately. Per-feature/per-locale breakdowns intentionally start empty so any new bucket is automatically flagged.
